---
number-sections: false
---
```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.25.0/full/pyodide.js"></script>

<style>
/* ══════════════════════════════════════════
   WORKSHEET PAPER
══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.ws-paper {
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 2.5rem 3rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.ws-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 2.5px solid #1a1a2e;
}
.ws-header-left .ws-title {
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1a1a2e;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}
.ws-header-left .ws-unit {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #6366f1;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}
.ws-header-right {
  text-align: right;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #64748b;
  line-height: 2;
}
.ws-info-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.25rem;
}
.ws-field {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  flex: 1;
}
.ws-field-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.ws-field-line {
  flex: 1;
  border-bottom: 1.5px solid #cbd5e1;
  min-width: 60px;
}
.ws-exercise {
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  page-break-inside: avoid;
}
.ws-exercise-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.85rem;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #eef2ff, transparent);
  border-left: 4px solid #6366f1;
  border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.ws-exercise-num   { font-size: 1rem;  font-weight: 800; color: #4f46e5; }
.ws-exercise-title { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a2e; flex: 1; }
.ws-instruction {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #64748b;
  font-style: italic;
  margin: 0.3rem 0 1rem 0.5rem;
}
.ws-parts-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  grid-auto-rows: auto;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  align-items: start;
}
.ws-part.word { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
.ws-part {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  background: #fafbff;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
}
.ws-part:hover { border-color: #c7d2fe; }
.ws-part-label {
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #6366f1;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.ws-part-question {
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0;
  text-align: center;
  white-space: normal;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  line-height: 1.8;
  overflow: hidden;
  min-width: 0;
}
.ws-part.word .ws-part-question { font-size: 0.88rem; text-align: left; line-height: 1.7; }
.ws-part-question mjx-container { max-width: 100% !important; overflow-x: auto !important; overflow-y: hidden !important; }
.ws-part-answer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
  padding-top: 0.4rem;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}
.ws-part-answer-line { flex: 1; border-bottom: 1.5px solid #cbd5e1; height: 1rem; }
.ws-answer-key {
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  padding-top: 1.25rem;
  border-top: 2px dashed #e2e8f0;
}
.ws-answer-key-title {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #94a3b8;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
}
.ws-answer-key-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
  gap: 0.35rem 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}
.ws-ans-item { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.25rem; }
.ws-ans-num  { font-weight: 700; color: #6366f1; font-size: 0.7rem; }

@media print {
  .no-print, .ws-toolbar { display: none !important; }
  .ws-paper { box-shadow: none; border: none; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; max-width: 100%; }
  .ws-part  { background: white; border: 1px solid #bbb; break-inside: avoid; }
  .ws-exercise { break-inside: avoid; }
  .ws-part:hover { border-color: #bbb; }
}
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .ws-paper { padding: 1.25rem; }
  .ws-parts-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); }
  .ws-answer-key-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
}
@media (max-width: 420px) { .ws-parts-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
</style>

<!-- ══ TOOLBAR ══ -->
<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="newSession()" disabled>🔄 New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="openPreview()">👁️ Preview & Print</button>
    <a href="https://app.flintk12.com/activities/arithmetic-mast-9558eb/sessions/new"
       target="_blank" class="ws-btn flint">🤖 Get Help</a>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">⏳ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<!-- ══ WORKSHEET CONTAINER ══ -->
<div id="ws-container">
  <p style="color:#94a3b8;text-align:center;padding:3rem 0">Generating worksheet...</p>
</div>

<!-- ══ PREVIEW MODAL ══ -->
<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">🖨️ Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">✕ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>

<script>
// ══ Python code ══
const PYTHON_CODE = `
import random, math, json
from datetime import date

def rand_int(a,b): return random.randint(a,b)
def simplify(n,d):
    g=math.gcd(abs(n),abs(d)); return n//g,d//g
def fmt(n,d):
    n,d=simplify(n,d); return str(n) if d==1 else f"{n}/{d}"
def fmt_latex(n,d):
    n,d=simplify(n,d)
    return str(n) if d==1 else f"\\\\dfrac{{{n}}}{{{d}}}"
def lcm(a,b): return abs(a*b)//math.gcd(a,b)
def rand_fraction(mx=9,md=12):
    n=rand_int(1,mx); d=rand_int(n+1,md); return n,d

LABELS=["a","b","c","d","e","f"]
NAMES=["Alex","Sara","Liam","Noor","Omar","Yara","Mia","Zaid"]
ITEMS=["pizza","cake","ribbon","rope","chocolate bar","bread"]

def _part_add_diff():
    d1,d2=rand_int(2,8),rand_int(2,8)
    while d2==d1: d2=rand_int(2,8)
    n1,n2=rand_int(1,d1-1),rand_int(1,d2-1)
    l=lcm(d1,d2); nn1,nn2=n1*(l//d1),n2*(l//d2)
    an,ad=simplify(nn1+nn2,l)
    return {"question_latex":f"\\\\dfrac{{{n1}}}{{{d1}}}+\\\\dfrac{{{n2}}}{{{d2}}}",
            "answer_latex":fmt_latex(an,ad),"answer":fmt(an,ad),
            "solution_latex":f"\\\\text{{LCD}}={l},\\\\;{fmt_latex(nn1,l)}+{fmt_latex(nn2,l)}={fmt_latex(an,ad)}"}

def _part_simplify():
    d=rand_int(4,24)
    factors=[f for f in range(2,d) if d%f==0]
    if not factors: return _part_simplify()
    g=random.choice(factors); n=rand_int(1,d//g-1)*g
    sn,sd=simplify(n,d)
    return {"question_latex":f"\\\\dfrac{{{n}}}{{{d}}}",
            "answer_latex":fmt_latex(sn,sd),"answer":fmt(sn,sd),
            "solution_latex":f"\\\\gcd({n},{d})={g},\\\\;{fmt_latex(sn,sd)}"}

def _part_word_add():
    name=random.choice(NAMES); item=random.choice(ITEMS)
    d=rand_int(3,8); n1=rand_int(1,d-2); n2=rand_int(1,d-n1-1)
    an,ad=simplify(n1+n2,d)
    return {"question_latex":f"\\\\text{{{name} ate }}\\\\dfrac{{{n1}}}{{{d}}}\\\\text{{ of {item}, then }}\\\\dfrac{{{n2}}}{{{d}}}\\\\text{{ more. Total?}}",
            "answer_latex":fmt_latex(an,ad),"answer":fmt(an,ad),
            "solution_latex":f"\\\\dfrac{{{n1}}}{{{d}}}+\\\\dfrac{{{n2}}}{{{d}}}={fmt_latex(an,ad)}",
            "is_word":True}

def _build(number,title,instruction,gen,ex_type,skill,difficulty,subtopic):
    parts=[gen() for _ in range(6)]
    for i,p in enumerate(parts): p["label"]=LABELS[i]
    return {"number":number,"title":title,"instruction":instruction,"parts":parts,
            "meta":{"type":ex_type,"skill":skill,"difficulty":difficulty,
                    "topic":"Fractions","subtopic":subtopic,
                    "unit":"Unit 1: Operations","curriculum":"MYP5"}}

def generate_session():
    exercises=[
        _build(1,"Fraction Addition","Find the LCD then add. Simplify your answer.",
               _part_add_diff,"add_different_denominator","fraction_addition",
               "medium","Addition with different denominators"),
        _build(2,"Simplifying Fractions","Simplify each fraction to its lowest terms.",
               _part_simplify,"simplify_fraction","simplification",
               "easy","Simplification to lowest terms"),
        _build(3,"Word Problems","Read carefully and show your working.",
               _part_word_add,"word_problem_add","fraction_application",
               "medium","Real-world fraction problems"),
    ]
    return json.dumps({
        "worksheet":{"title":"Fraction Operations","unit":"Unit 1 · Operations",
                     "topic":"Fractions","date":str(date.today()),
                     "total_parts":sum(len(e["parts"]) for e in exercises)},
        "exercises":exercises
    })

generate_session()
`;

// ══ Render ══
function render(data) {
  const ws  = data.worksheet;
  const exs = data.exercises;
  let html  = `<div class="ws-paper">`;

  html += `
    <div class="ws-header">
      <div class="ws-header-left">
        <div class="ws-title">${ws.title}</div>
        <div class="ws-unit">${ws.unit}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ws-header-right">
        <div>Date &nbsp; ${ws.date}</div>
        <div>Topic &nbsp; ${ws.topic}</div>
        <div>Total &nbsp; ${ws.total_parts} marks</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ws-info-row">
      <div class="ws-field"><span class="ws-field-label">Name</span><div class="ws-field-line"></div></div>
      <div class="ws-field"><span class="ws-field-label">Class</span><div class="ws-field-line"></div></div>
      <div class="ws-field" style="max-width:140px">
        <span class="ws-field-label">Score</span>
        <div class="ws-field-line"></div>
        <span style="font-size:0.72rem;color:#94a3b8;white-space:nowrap">/ ${ws.total_parts}</span>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  exs.forEach(ex => {
    html += `
      <div class="ws-exercise">
        <div class="ws-exercise-header">
          <span class="ws-exercise-num">Ex ${ex.number}.</span>
          <span class="ws-exercise-title">${ex.title}</span>
        </div>
        ${ex.instruction ? `<div class="ws-instruction">${ex.instruction}</div>` : ""}
        <div class="ws-parts-grid">`;

    ex.parts.forEach(part => {
      const isWord = part.is_word || false;
      html += `
          <div class="ws-part${isWord ? ' word' : ''}">
            <div class="ws-part-label">${part.label} )</div>
            <div class="ws-part-question">\\(${part.question_latex}\\)</div>
            <div class="ws-part-answer"><span>Ans</span><div class="ws-part-answer-line"></div></div>
          </div>`;
    });

    html += `</div></div>`;
  });

  html += `
    <div class="ws-answer-key">
      <div class="ws-answer-key-title">✅ Answer Key</div>
      <div class="ws-answer-key-grid">`;
  exs.forEach(ex => {
    ex.parts.forEach(part => {
      html += `<div class="ws-ans-item"><span class="ws-ans-num">${ex.number}${part.label})</span>\\(${part.answer_latex}\\)</div>`;
    });
  });
  html += `</div></div></div>`;

  document.getElementById("ws-container").innerHTML = html;
  if (window.MathJax) MathJax.typesetPromise([document.getElementById("ws-container")]);
}

// ══ Pyodide ══
let pyodide = null;

async function init() {
  pyodide = await loadPyodide({ indexURL: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.25.0/full/" });
  const raw = pyodide.runPython(PYTHON_CODE);
  render(JSON.parse(raw));
  document.getElementById("btn-ws-new").disabled = false;
  const loading = document.getElementById("ws-loading");
  loading.textContent = "✅ Ready";
  setTimeout(() => loading.style.display = "none", 2000);
}

async function newSession() {
  document.getElementById("ws-container").innerHTML =
    '<p style="color:#94a3b8;text-align:center;padding:3rem 0">Generating...</p>';
  const raw = await pyodide.runPythonAsync("generate_session()");
  render(JSON.parse(raw));
}

// ══ Preview & Print ══
function openPreview() {
  const src = document.getElementById("ws-container");
  if (!src || !src.innerHTML.trim()) { alert("Please wait for the worksheet to load."); return; }
  const preview = document.getElementById("ws-preview-scroll");
  preview.innerHTML = `<div class="ws-preview-page">${src.innerHTML}</div>`;
  if (window.MathJax) MathJax.typesetPromise([preview]);
  document.getElementById("ws-preview-overlay").classList.add("open");
  document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
}

function wsClosePreview() {
  document.getElementById("ws-preview-overlay").classList.remove("open");
  document.body.style.overflow = "";
}

function wsPrint() { window.print(); }

document.getElementById("ws-preview-overlay")?.addEventListener("click", e => {
  if (e.target === e.currentTarget) wsClosePreview();
});
document.addEventListener("keydown", e => { if (e.key === "Escape") wsClosePreview(); });

init();
</script>
```
